ui.title: How can we help?
ui.subtitle: Search our most common questions, or browse the topics below. Can't find an answer? Reach out and we'll help.
ui.noResults: No answers matched your search. Try different keywords, or contact us below.
ui.contactText: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is happy to help you out.
ui.footDesc: Cosous is your co-sous chef — import recipes from anywhere, plan meals, and cook smarter.

items.a: Cosous is your co-sous chef — an app that imports recipes from anywhere, builds smart grocery lists, plans your meals, and guides you through hands-free cooking. AI handles the tedious parts so you can focus on the food.

items.q: Which platforms is Cosous available on?
items.a: Cosous is available on iOS via the App Store and on Android via Google Play. Your recipes and lists sync automatically across all your devices.
Yes. The core features — importing recipes, grocery lists, meal planning, and step-by-step cooking — are free. Premium unlocks real-time family sharing and a few extras.

items.q: How do I import a recipe?
items.a: Paste any recipe link — from a website or a social platform like Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube — and Cosous reads the page for you. Ingredients, steps, and nutrition are extracted automatically into a clean, structured recipe.

items.q: Which websites and apps are supported?
items.a: Most recipe websites and major social platforms are supported, including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Facebook, Reddit, and more. If a page doesn't import cleanly, you can always edit the recipe manually.

items.q: A recipe imported with missing details. What can I do?
items.a: Open the recipe and tap Edit to add or fix any ingredients, steps, or serving sizes. Your changes are saved instantly and synced across devices.
When you add a recipe's ingredients to your grocery list, AI automatically sorts them by store aisle — produce, dairy, pantry, and so on — so your shop is faster and more organized.

items.q: Can I plan meals for the whole week?
items.a: Yes. Drop recipes into breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks across the week in the meal planner. You can then send everything you need to your grocery list in one tap.
Premium unlocks real-time family sharing — share recipes, grocery lists, and meal plans with family members and stay in sync across every device, instantly.

items.q: How do I manage or cancel my subscription?
items.a: Subscriptions are managed through your App Store or Google Play account. Open your store's subscription settings to upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time.

items.q: How do I change the app language?
items.a: Cosous supports English, Chinese, Spanish, and Japanese. The app follows your device language, and you can switch the website language any time using the picker in the footer.
Yes. Your recipes are securely backed up and available offline, with changes syncing automatically across your devices.
We take your privacy seriously. See our Privacy Policy for full details on what we collect and how it's used.
